title: QianmoSpeedMod
description: Qianmo Speed is a Minecraft mod inspired by Don't Starve that grants speed boosts on roads through enchanted boots, featuring two detection modes and extensive customization.
body:
**QianmoSpeedMod is a mod that detects roads and increases movement speed, inspired by the road travel mechanics in Don't Starve.**

# 🎯 Core Features
Travel Blessings Enchantment
The mod adds the "Travel Blessings" enchantment, which can be applied to boots.
It automatically detects whether the player is standing on a road and grants a speed boost. Higher enchantment levels provide greater speed bonuses.

# 🛤️ Intelligent Road Detection System
Three Detection Modes:

## SMART Mode
Automatically switches intelligently between BASIC and ENHANCED modes.

## BASIC Mode
Quickly identifies roads based on a preset block list.

## ENHANCED Mode
Intelligently recognizes complex road networks.
Activates when road-generation mods (such as RoadWeaver, Road Architect, etc.) are detected.

# ⚙️ Highly Configurable
Almost all features can be adjusted via configuration files:

# 🌍 Full Localization

Supports a wide range of languages.

Clear and easy-to-understand configuration comments (bilingual).

-----中文版-----

**阡陌疾旅 是一个检测道路并增加移动速度的模组，灵感来源于《饥荒》中的道路行走机制。**

# 🎯 核心功能
模组新增了"旅行的祝福"附魔（Travel Blessings），可应用于靴子。
会自动识别脚下是否为道路,并且给予加速。附魔等级越高速度加成越多

# 🛤️ 智能道路检测系统
三种检测模式
## SMART 模式
自动在 BASIC 和 ENHANCED 模式间智能切换

## BASIC 模式

基于预设方块列表快速识别道路

## ENHANCED 模式

智能识别复杂道路网络
在识别到道路生成类模组（如 RoadWeaver、Road Architect 等）时启用

# ⚙️ 高度可配置
几乎所有功能都可通过配置文件调整：

# 🌍 完整本地化
支持超多语言
清晰易懂的配置注释（双语）
